mapper.sql:
select oi1.order_no , oi1.order_status_enum_order_status_enum_id_1 , pi.shelf_life , oi1.customer_info_customer_info_id_1 , oi1.commission , pi.barcode , pi.brand , oi.quantity , oi1.user_info_user_info_id_1 , oi.total_price , pi.product_status_enum_product_status_enum_id_1 , pi.specification , pi.serial_number , oi.product_info_product_info_id_1 , oi.unit_price , oi1.profit_amount , pi.product_name , oi.order_info_order_info_id_1 , oi.order_item_id , oi1.shipping_fee , oi1.order_date , oi1.general_orders , pi.unit , oi1.total_amount , pi.min_stock , pi.category
FROM order_item oi left join order_info oi1 on oi.order_info_order_info_id_1 = oi1.order_info_id left join product_info pi on oi.product_info_product_info_id_1 = pi.product_info_id
mapper.select:
select oi1.order_no , oi1.order_status_enum_order_status_enum_id_1 , pi.shelf_life , oi1.customer_info_customer_info_id_1 , oi1.commission , pi.barcode , pi.brand , oi.quantity , oi1.user_info_user_info_id_1 , oi.total_price , pi.product_status_enum_product_status_enum_id_1 , pi.specification , pi.serial_number , oi.product_info_product_info_id_1 , oi.unit_price , oi1.profit_amount , pi.product_name , oi.order_info_order_info_id_1 , oi.order_item_id , oi1.shipping_fee , oi1.order_date , oi1.general_orders , pi.unit , oi1.total_amount , pi.min_stock , pi.category
FROM order_item oi left join
order_info
oi1 on oi.order_info_order_info_id_1 = oi1.order_info_id left join
product_info
pi on oi.product_info_product_info_id_1 = pi.product_info_id
${ew.customSqlSegment}
